in Home- Enteral Nutrition This field is checked if the patient receives enteral nutrition therapy at home. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x
M1030_THH_IV_INFUS M1030 (M0250) Therapies in Home- IV Infusion This field is checked if the patient receives intravenous or infusion therapy at home. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x
M1030_THH_NONE_ABV M1030 (M0250) Therapies in Home- None Above This field is checked if the patient receives none of the above
